interfaces.name: qso-event-ledger
required_resolution: separate runtime and Fabric sequence spaces

interfaces.name: qso-runtime-report
required_resolution: accepted producer subject run and report-class identities
partial-failure cleanup uncertainty and rollback fields

compatibility_invariants: interface names and semantic classes are unambiguous within one registry generation
producer consumer subject run schema canonicalization and payload identities are explicit
duplicate keys non-finite values unknown fields and unsupported versions fail closed
Boolean values do not satisfy integer fields
idempotency keys and duplicate outcomes are defined
retry_limit zero creates no automatic replay authority
rejected records cause no downstream mutation
corrections revocations and supersession append evidence and invalidate affected projections
runtime success and Fabric acceptance do not imply Repository 1 canonical acceptance
migration and rollback preserve old evidence and identify every affected consumer
gluing_witnesses: runtime event ledger to Fabric collaboration ledger to Repository 1 reconciliation
runtime execution report to Fabric aggregate report to Repository 1 disposition
runtime evidence to Bridge transport to QSO-STUDIO or AionUi display
correction or revocation to downstream invalidation to bounded recovery
schema migration to mixed-version consumers to rollback
denied_inferences: byte identity is not semantic compatibility
schema version equality is not namespace agreement
successful validation is not ecosystem admission
transport or display is not canonical status
runtime or Fabric success is not authority
this profile grants no merge release publication or deployment approval
